title: How To Watch YouTube Shorts Faster⏩

transcript.text: This is how to watch YouTube Shorts at double speed. In the Shorts player above the engagement buttons, simply tap and hold the screen to trigger double speed on the short. It will continue to run at that speed until you lift your finger off the screen. And I highly recommend you test it out right now. Otherwise, I'm going to be speaking very, very slowly.
